requirement_topic.en: ISED Radio Certification — RSS-247 for licence-exempt Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and LE-LAN
requirement_topic.zh: ISED无线电认证 — 适用于免许可Wi-Fi、蓝牙和LE-LAN的RSS-247
requirement_topic.zht: ISED無線電認證 — 適用於免許可Wi-Fi、藍牙和LE-LAN的RSS-247

summary.en: Wireless transmitters placed on the Canadian market must meet Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada radio equipment requirements. Licence-exempt Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, frequency hopping, digital transmission, and local-area network devices commonly require testing and certification to RSS-247, together with the general requirements in RSS-Gen and the Radiocommunication Act and Radiocommunication Regulations.
summary.zh: 投放加拿大市场的无线发射设备必须满足加拿大创新、科学及经济发展部的无线电设备要求。免许可Wi-Fi、蓝牙、跳频、数字传输及局域网设备通常需要按RSS-247测试和认证，并同时满足RSS-Gen、《无线电通信法》及《无线电通信条例》的一般要求。
summary.zht: 投放加拿大市場的無線發射設備必須滿足加拿大創新、科學及經濟發展部的無線電設備要求。免許可Wi-Fi、藍牙、跳頻、數位傳輸及區域網路裝置通常需要按RSS-247測試和認證，並同時滿足RSS-Gen、《無線電通信法》及《無線電通信條例》的一般要求。

standards_or_laws: ISED RSS-247 — Digital Transmission Systems, Frequency Hopping Systems and Licence-Exempt Local Area Network Devices
ISED RSS-Gen — General Requirements for Compliance of Radio Apparatus

summary.en: In China, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth transmitters generally require SRRC model approval under the radio administration framework, and some complete products may also require CCC depending on product category. SRRC confirms compliance with Chinese spectrum parameters but does not create a Canadian ISED certification record.
summary.zh: 在中国，Wi-Fi和蓝牙发射设备通常需要依据无线电管理框架取得SRRC型号核准，部分整机还可能因产品类别需要CCC认证。SRRC确认设备符合中国频谱参数，但不会生成加拿大ISED认证记录。
summary.zht: 在中國，Wi-Fi和藍牙發射設備通常需要依據無線電管理框架取得SRRC型號核准，部分整機還可能因產品類別需要CCC認證。SRRC確認設備符合中國頻譜參數，但不會生成加拿大ISED認證記錄。

standards_or_laws: China SRRC model approval for radio transmitting equipment
China CCC certification where the finished product is in a covered product category
GB/T 15629.11 and applicable MIIT radio technical requirements

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval is not accepted as Canadian radio certification. The device must be tested to the applicable Canadian RSS standard set, certification must be filed through the Canadian certification process, and the Canadian technical filing must match the marketed hardware, firmware, antennas, power settings, and frequency bands.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准不能作为加拿大无线电认证使用。设备必须按适用的加拿大RSS标准组合进行测试，通过加拿大认证程序提交认证，并确保加拿大技术文件与实际销售的硬件、固件、天线、功率设置和频段一致。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准不能作為加拿大無線電認證使用。裝置必須按適用的加拿大RSS標準組合進行測試，通過加拿大認證程序提交認證，並確保加拿大技術文件與實際銷售的硬體、韌體、天線、功率設定和頻段一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ISED certification required for applicable Category I radio apparatus before marketing in Canada
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC model approval required for applicable radio transmitting equipment before sale or import in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RSS-247 and RSS-Gen are core Canadian radio requirements for many Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices. A Chinese SRRC certificate is useful background evidence only and does not replace ISED certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】RSS-247和RSS-Gen是许多Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备的核心加拿大无线电要求。中国SRRC证书只能作为背景资料，不能替代ISED认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】RSS-247和RSS-Gen是許多Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置的核心加拿大無線電要求。中國SRRC證書只能作為背景資料，不能取代ISED認證。

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
